---
title: "<i>Events of the Month</i>"
---

## <i>Events of the Month</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This periodical was advertised as <i>Events of the Month: A Magazine of News, Literature, Science, and General Information; Designed for Youthful Readers</i> to be published by John and Charles Mozley, starting January 1st, 1864. Price sixpence.” It was edited by Henrietta Murray and ran from January 1864 to January 1865. CMY later described it to Macmillan (3 June 1864) as “a sort of school room Athenaeum”, and tried unsuccessfully to get him to take it over when the Mozleys abandoned it.(see Macmillan to CMY  17 January 1865).  ‘Lost [sic] Heartsease Leaves’ was published in it in January 1865.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
